message:
🐛 Parallelize PredictionWorker cluster data gathering (#10061)

Replace three sequential loops in gatherClusterData (pod issues, GPU
nodes, offline nodes) with a single parallel loop using goroutines +
sync.WaitGroup + sync.Mutex.  Each healthy cluster now runs all three
queries concurrently with a per-cluster timeout (perClusterDataTimeout),
preventing total wall-clock time from exceeding predictionTimeout when
many clusters or high-latency clusters are present.

Also switches from ListClusters to DeduplicatedClusters to avoid
querying the same physical cluster twice through different kubeconfig
contexts.

Fixes #10058

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Signed-off-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>
Co-authored-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>
